# pin-actions-to-sha

Placeholder skill content for eval-harness tests. Not the real registry
skill — see the `agentskills` repo for that.

Lives in the `gha-tools` bundle in this fixture, to model the registry's
bundle layout (`plugins/<bundle>/skills/<skill>/SKILL.md`, bundle != skill).
